scripts.test:dev: npm run pw:dev -- --project=globalSetup && npm run pw:dev
scripts.test:dev:tag: npm run pw:dev -- --project=globalSetup && npm run pw:dev -- -g @dev
scripts.test:qa: npm run pw:qa -- --project=globalSetup && npm run pw:qa
scripts.test:qa:tag: npm run pw:qa -- --project=globalSetup && npm run pw:qa -- -g @qa
scripts.test:all: npm run test:dev && npm run test:qa
